PROFILE.SUBTITLE_OWN: Manage your account information and security settings.
PROFILE.SUBTITLE_OTHER: Viewing account information for this user.

PROFILE.CHANGE_ROLE_DESCRIPTION: Assign a new role to this user. Permissions change immediately.
PROFILE.RESET_PASSWORD_DESCRIPTION: Generate a temporary password. The user must change it on next login.
PROFILE.DELETE_USER_DESCRIPTION: Permanently remove this account. This action cannot be undone.

CREATE.TITLE: Create User

CREATE.ACCOUNT_INFORMATION_SUBTITLE: Basic details for the new user
CREATE.USER_ID_HINT: Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores only
CREATE.NAME: Name

RESET_PASSWORD_DIALOG.TITLE: Reset Password
RESET_PASSWORD_DIALOG.SUBTITLE: Resetting password for
RESET_PASSWORD_DIALOG.INFO_BANNER: This password is temporary. The user will be required to change it upon their next login.

UPDATE_ROLE_DIALOG.TITLE: Update User Role
UPDATE_ROLE_DIALOG.SUBTITLE: Update role for
UPDATE_ROLE_DIALOG.WARNING_ROOM_MEMBER: If this user owns rooms, ownership will be transferred to the root admin.
UPDATE_ROLE_DIALOG.WARNING_ADMIN: All room memberships of this user will be removed because admins have direct access to all rooms.
UPDATE_ROLE_DIALOG.WARNING_KICK: If the user is currently in a meeting and loses access to the room after this update, they will be kicked from the meeting.

ERRORS.PATTERN: Only lowercase letters, numbers and underscores allowed
ERRORS.NEW_PASSWORD_SAME: New password must be different from current password
